flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 28% at Wenatchee Valley College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.8k vs 2.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Wenatchee Valley College fell 27% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4k → 1.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Wenatchee Valley College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.3k → $5.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Wenatchee Valley College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.7k → $5.6k).
